summary: The user is building a gaming PC and seeks advice on choosing between AMD and Intel processors, considering their performance for gaming. They also discuss introducing their younger brother to gaming by lending him their PS4 and contemplate purchasing an Xbox Series S as a beginner-friendly console for his birthday, along with recommendations for suitable games.
facts: The user has been playing games almost daily for three months and is currently more into RPGs. The user has been lending their PS4 to their younger brother, who enjoys playing Spider-Man and Uncharted 4. The user is considering getting their brother an Xbox Series S for his birthday next month. The user is looking for beginner-friendly games for the Xbox Series S that are similar to Spider-Man or Uncharted. The user has decided to consider the Xbox Series S for their brother due to its beginner-friendly nature and next-gen features. The user has been researching AMD and Intel processors for building a gaming PC. The user is interested in RPGs and has asked for recommendations for recent titles that would work well with their chosen processor.
